mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, encryption_type, kms_key_id, enable_encryption, enable_client_encryption, tls_version, integrity_check_type, enable_content_detection, enable_virus_scan, enable_sensitive_data_scan, content_detection_threshold, virus_scan_action, created_time, updated_time
mapper.update: UPDATE security_config SET encryption_type = #{encryptionType}, enable_encryption = #{enableEncryption}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE security_config SET enable_content_detection = #{enable}, content_detection_threshold = #{threshold}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE security_config SET enable_virus_scan = #{enable}, virus_scan_action = #{action}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE security_config SET enable_sensitive_data_scan = #{enable}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
